mapper.insert:
insert into weart_company (company_idx, company_id, company_pwd, company_buis_number, company_name, company_ceoName, company_phone, company_buisAddress, company_auth_file_name, company_auth_file_size, company_phone_auth, company_auth, comapny_regdate,company_delyn,company_ip)
values(#{company_idx}, #{company_id}, #{company_pwd}, #{company_buis_number},#{company_name},#{company_ceoName}, #{company_phone},#{company_buisAddress},#{company_auth_file_name},#{company_auth_file_size},#{company_phone_auth},#{company_auth}, #{comapny_regdate},#{company_delyn}, #{company_ip})
mapper.select: SELECT a.company_id, b.member_id FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) company_id FROM weart_company) a, (SELECT COUNT(*) member_id FROM weart_member) b ,
mapper.insert:
insert into gallery(gallery_content, origin_filename, system_filename)
values(#{gallery_content}, #{origin_filename}, #{system_filename})
values(default, #{origin_filename}, #{system_filename})
